feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Surcharge VBA script not found macro record.
entry.content:
Hi Dears,

I did a macro record in VA03 opened Display but did not find the scripting for "SURCHARGE". Please help the script so that it can copy the surcharge value. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: I can not find /UI5/ABAP_REPOSITORY_SRV in my system.
entry.content:
Hello,

I have added a  /UI5/ABAP_REPOSITORY_SRV in segw and then removed it, was  wrong. Now I get this message in image when I am trying to add the service again.

 

 

 

1- How can I find it again?

As I know, to add it again I should remove all dependencies such as Model and classes. Is this correct? 
2- Should I remove the classes in the image first?

When I try to delete the classes above I get  this message:

I hope you can help, thank you.

Mahmood

entry.title: "Service does not exist" while creating IAM app in eclipse
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I am trying to create an IAM app in eclipse by follwing the tutorial as in STEP 8 (Create a SAP Fiori App and Deploy it to SAP BTP, ABAP Environment ). I am getting the below error "Service does not exist". I tried giving different service names but still showing me the error. Please let me know which service name I have to provide here for creating IAM app.

Thanks,

Bharath

entry.title: Unable to use /DMO/ packages SAP BTP Cockpit trial
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues,

I am learning SAP BTP Cockpit via trial following this tutorial https://www.youtube.com/live/Q4I983Ma81A?si=JO8H2bTmc2WI2ztw, and trying to use /DMO/Flight package after pulling a corresponding pull request via ABAP Git Repositories: https://github.com/SAP-samples/abap-platform-refscen-flight.git

I see the status of the request Pulled successfully

but I can't use /DMO/ packages (e.g. /DMO/Flight) as they don't appear in my Project Explorer (I expected to see there /DMO/ templates in Database Tables folder, but there's only a file I created, no templates).

Could you please tell me what should be done to install the missed /DMO/ packages (via Eclipse IDE)?

entry.title: RAP Custom Entity & Analytical application
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I was working on the old ABAP report which converted as CDS and exposed via OData v2.

From BTP ABAP, I have consumed above service then displayed the content in the Fiori Element List report page via Custom Entities. 

One of the columns in the report contains amount field and I would like to show the aggregated output on the same.

Is this possible to do so in this case, if not could you please suggest an alternative approch for this requirement ?

@Andre_Fischer 

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards,

Muthu

entry.title: CSRF token retrieval fails when making calls from the SAP BTP ABAP environment to an S/4 HANA on-pre
entry.content:
Hello team,

I am trying to call the S/4 HANA on premise system from ABAP Environment via Destinations.

GET Call is working as expected. 

Below is the code. I am trying to do the post call based on some input parameter

DATA(http_destination) = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_cloud_destination(

i_name = CONV #( <fs_sap_systems>-destination_name )

i_authn_mode = if_a4c_cp_service=>service_specific ).

 

lo_http_client = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination( http_destination ).

lo_client_proxy = /iwbep/cl_cp_factory_remote=>create_v2_remote_proxy(

is_proxy_model_key = VALUE #( repository_id = 'DEFAULT'

proxy_model_id = 'ZSCM_USER_LOCKED'

proxy_model_version = '0001' )

 

io_http_client = lo_http_client

iv_relative_service_root = '/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZS_USER_LOCKS_SRV1111/' ).

 

" Prepare business data

ls_business_data = VALUE #( uname = is_user_locked_st-uname ).

 

" Navigate to the resource and create a request for the create operation

lo_request = lo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set( 'USER_LIST_LOCK_SET' )->create_request_for_create( ).

 

" Set the business data for the created entity

lo_request->set_business_data( ls_business_data ).

 

lo_response = lo_request->execute( ).

After executing the statement, I encounter a CSRF token failed exception. Is there a need to upload any certificate on the S/4 HANA side?

entry.title: "Creation Failed" error during ABAP TRIAL Booster execution in US region subaccount
entry.content:
Hello,

When I execute the boost it fails with below error, eventually:

"Service broker error: Service broker abap-trial-broker failed with: Internal Server Error"

I've tried to create an instance manually as well re-creating the sub-account but error remains the same.

Does anyone happen to know what it could be?

entry.title: Value Help with parameter does not open in Parameter View
entry.content:
Hi all,

for a RAP action I'm using a abstract view entity to define the import parameters for the action. To ensure correct values I'm adding value helps to this abstract view.

One of the Value Helps needs a parameter "Valid From" to filter the result directly for a time period. But this is not working at the moment. I'm passing the parameter like here descriped https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/value-help-with-additional-binding?version=sap_btp

define abstract entity ZZGID_CreateContractP
{
  ContractType           : zzgi_contract_type
  ....
  ValidFrom              : /gicom/valid_from;
  ValidTo                : /gicom/valid_to;
  .....
 
  @Consumption           : {
    valueHelpDefinition  : [{ entity: { name: 'ZZGII_Contract_LanguageVH', element: 'Language' },
                              additionalBinding: [{element: 'ContractType', localElement: 'ContractType', usage: #FILTER_AND_RESULT  },
                                                  {parameter: 'PVALIDFROM', localElement: 'ValidFrom' , usage: #FILTER }]
                           }]
  }
  Language               : zzgi_contract_language;
}

This works so far and the value helps open on the App Preview.

But once I've now add the parameter to my value value help and activate it, the Value help is not shown any more in the App Preview and the system doesn't provide me any error message.

The value helps is defined in that way:

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #MANDATORY
@EndUserText.label: 'Value Help for Contract Language'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@ObjectModel:{
  dataCategory: #VALUE_HELP,
  representativeKey: 'ContractType',
  modelingPattern:       #VALUE_HELP_PROVIDER,
  supportedCapabilities: [#VALUE_HELP_PROVIDER,#SEARCHABLE_ENTITY],
  usageType: {
    dataClass:      #META,
    serviceQuality: #A,
    sizeCategory:   #S
  }
}
/*+[hideWarning] { "IDS" : [ "KEY_CHECK" ] }*/
define view entity ZZGII_Contract_LanguageVH
with parameters PVALIDFROM : zzgi_valid_from
  as select from ZZGII_ContractTypeLanguage as Language

{
  key Type  as ContractType,
  key Langu as Language,
  key Jurisdiction

}
where Language.ValidFrom <= $parameters.PVALIDFROM and
      Language.ValidTo   >= $parameters.PVALIDFROM

Opening of the value help manually in eclipse and maintaining the parameter is working so fine.

So it seems that for some reason the parameter is not passed to the value help by the framework. In the restrictions section https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/development-constraints?version=sap_btp I didn't find any restriction for value helps.

Does someone have an idea how to solve this problem?

Thank you and best regards,
Patrick

entry.title: drop down field auto update on alv grid display
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I am using cl_gui_alv_grid and my requirement is I have having 100s of records in the internal table and there is dropdown functionality for remarks.
When the user selects the value in the first record the same should be able to reflect for all the records in the same column rather than user
manually selecting each and every one.

I could able to manage to get into the internal table by looping the record and passing the fixed value but upon using refresh_table_display it is not getting updated on the screen.
I mean I can not able to see the first dropdown value in the rest of the fields.
I have tried with passing stable parameter to the refresh_table_display but no luck.
I just want to see all the columns of the dropdown field gets filled when I select in the first row with the same value.
Kindly help me with it as it is urgent requirement from the business.

Please consider the object gv_alv3 in the below screenshot as gv_alv is altogether different screen.

In debugging I could able to see the remarks column getting updated with values for all records but when I do F8 it is not visible on the grid.

entry.title: Use cases of SAP BTP Automation Pilot
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am new to "SAP BTP Automation Pilot" , kindly help on what it provides and how it can be used and what is the uses cases of "SAP BTP Automation Pilot". Please help on this. thank you so much in advance.

Thanks & Regards,

Prasad

entry.title: Odata Service for creating a financial transaction in S4 HANA, alternative for BAPI_FTR_CREATE, IRAT
entry.content:
Hello members

We have made a customn Odata service through which we are calling the required BAPIs to create a financial transaction in SAP S4 HANA system. But we want to avoid doing custom development in S4 HANA for the purpose of keeping the core clean. Is there any standard SAP provided Odata service available for the same purpose? If yes , please let me know which Odata service APIs can be used for creating financial transactions in SAP.  If no, can anyone suggest how can we call BAPI from CAPM(Cloud Application Programming , BAS on BTP)  or from outside SAP with proper error handling and return messages for the confirmation of successful or failed BAPI execution.

Please provide clues. Thanks. SAP BTP, ABAP environment NW ABAP Gateway (OData)

entry.title: CSRF token error(403 Post ) fails when making calls from the SAP Build Apps to ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have developed an application using SAP Build that connects to an ABAP on Cloud system. In SAP Build Apps, the POST call used to create records works correctly. However, after deploying the application to SAP Workzone, the POST call fails with a "503 CSRF token validation failed" error.

Could you please assist in resolving this issue?

Is there any config needed in the SAP Build WorkZone? 

Below is the destination details

 

 

 

Thank you.

entry.title: BTP Trial activated but not accessible (for Fiori course)
entry.content:
I have started doing following course:
https://learning.sap.com/courses/developing-and-extending-sap-fiori-elements-apps

However I'm unable to start BTP trial, for one the link in the course is outdated and doesn't work,but I was able to find BTP section manually and asked for a Trial.
I got an e-mail containing a link and message that trial has started, however when I click the link it send me to a verification site which I'm unable to complete as it says that my number is already used, at the below of the page I can log in through Universal ID without an issue but I'm unable to get through the verification.
I'm stuck and I'd like to be able to do exercises for this course(needed for eclipse set up).

The mail that I got is on the same mail that I can log in through Universal ID. 
I made three tickets overall each sending me somewhere else to other part of SAP support, last one suggested here.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: What is the reason for getting the error message "No authorization to create objects in the system"?
entry.content:
When I tried to create a new ABAP repository object in a SAP BTP, ABAP Environement system I got the following error message "No authorization to create objects in the system".

What can be the reason for this behavior?

entry.title: popup with continue and cancel buttons
entry.content:
Hello,

We have an app developed using restful abap. In the object page we have few address fields. On click of a custom action called 'Validate address' we would like to validate the address ( we have an API that does this) and show the corrected / suggested address in a popup with 'Continue' and 'Cancel' buttons. Where user will select 'Continue' to accept the suggested address or 'Cancel' . Wondering if this kind of popup is possible using RAP. If not,  any suggestions for a workaround would be greatly appreciated. thanks

entry.title: Not able to log in to trial account.
entry.content:
Hi, I can no longer log on to my BTP trial account. This is the error: "The uaa credentials of the service key used to create this project are no longer valid. Please create a new project using the ABAP Cloud Project Wizard."

I have seen others with this error, but I have still not been able to resolve it. 

Any help appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: while releasing the business process project, I encountered an error
entry.content:
I went through the blog, but in the last step while releasing the business process project, I encountered an error and got stuck here.

https://developers.sap.com/mission.invoice-processing-approval-spa.html


Could you help me to correct the error.

Thanks & Regards,

Durgarao .

entry.title: SAP BTP Application Log as Launchpad or V4 Odata service?
entry.content:
The are useful application  logging tools in SAP BTP.
CL_BALI_LOG_DB
But I cant find any V4 OData service providing access to log data.
Only a S/4 Hana app. But this important to have on the basic ABAP (steamPunk) environment.
https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F1487')/S28OP

I was expecting to find a Launchpad app available on ABAP environment to show the application log.
At a minimum a v4 service to you can generate a basic UI.
Are we supposed to build our own UI app ? 
How can you display the application log on SAP BTP ABAP ?

entry.title: select query with for all entries not fetching the records
entry.content:
HI gurus, I am uploading excel file with bukrs gjahr augbl utr_no and utr_date into internal table gt_upload.
I have moved only 3 fields from gt_upload to lt_upload bukrs gjahr and augbl by looping gt_upload( though ideally not required to do so)

MY requirement is to fetch records from bseg based on bukrs gjahr augbl and shkzg as 'S'.

The lt_upload contains 126 records of which 125 records not exist with bukrs gjahr and augbl in the bseg itself as due to old data and quality system has not yet refreshed. I can see the last record exist in the bseg table.

I should get at least this record into my lt_bseg but, lt_bseg is showing 0 records.

I believe as per my understanding there should be 1 record which matches the criteria and I should get 1 record in lt_bseg which is not
happening.

What all are the possible reasons that it is not getting fetched from bseg when the criteria is satisfied ?

entry.title: Stock on Hand using 2LIS_03_BF
entry.content:
Hi There,

I have a requirement to calculate the following , stock on hand for a given day using a SQL given we have the following extractors enabled  2LIS_03_BF (MSEG) & 2LIS_03_UM

  • Inventory QTY
  • Inventory unit cost
  • Inventory Value
  • In network in transit Qty
  • In network in transit Value

Any suggestions or  any help would be much appreciated.  The client does not want to use MATDOC and MATDOC_EXTRACT for their reporting but would like to use the above two extractors.

 

Thanks

Nick
